procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1020

sigma.title: Github Fork Private Repositories Setting Enabled/Cleared
Modification or Deletion of an AWS RDS Cluster
PowerShell Script With File Hostname Resolving Capabilities
PowerShell Script With File Upload Capabilities

osquery.name: t1020_exfil_net
osquery.query_text: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '127.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '10.%' AND s.remote_address NOT LIKE '192.168.%' LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 3 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
